```{r}
# ============================================================================
# VOLCANO PLOTS FOR EACH STRATUM (AB, PPI, OTH, NO)
# DESeq2: Timepoint -2 vs -1
# ============================================================================

library(phyloseq)
library(DESeq2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(speedyseq)
library(microbiome)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load and clean
# ------------------------------------------------------------
ps <- readRDS('/RSF_res_4_ps/RSF_all_physeq_wgs_COUNTS_v3.rds')
ps <- subset_taxa(ps, !grepl("SGB", Species))
sample_data(ps)$Batch <- as.factor(sample_data(ps)$Batch)
bad_batch_samples <- c('B-024-1', 'B-024-2', 'B-027-2','B-027-1','B-030-1', 'B-030-2')
if (length(bad_batch_samples) > 0) {
  ps <- prune_samples(!(sample_names(ps) %in% bad_batch_samples), ps)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Define Strata
# ------------------------------------------------------------
sam <- data.frame(sample_data(ps), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
sam$Strata <- NA_character_
sam$Strata[sam$Group == "A" & sam$Proton_Pump_Inhibitors == "No"] <- "AB"
sam$Strata[sam$Group == "C"] <- "NO"
sam$Strata[sam$Proton_Pump_Inhibitors == "Yes" & is.na(sam$Strata)] <- "PPI"
sam$Strata[sam$Group == "B" & is.na(sam$Strata)] <- "OTH"
sam$Strata <- factor(sam$Strata, levels = c("AB", "PPI", "OTH", "NO"))
sample_data(ps) <- sam

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 3. Clean taxonomy, aggregate to Species, filter core taxa (prevalence 10%)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
clean_tax_table <- function(ps_obj) {
  tax_df <- as.data.frame(as.matrix(tax_table(ps_obj)))
  for(col in colnames(tax_df)) {
    tax_df[[col]] <- gsub("\\|.*$", "", tax_df[[col]])
    tax_df[[col]] <- gsub("^[a-z]__", "", tax_df[[col]])
  }
  tax_table(ps_obj) <- tax_table(as.matrix(tax_df))
  return(ps_obj)
}
ps <- clean_tax_table(ps)
ps <- speedyseq::tax_glom(ps, taxrank = "Species", NArm = TRUE)
# Prevalence filter: 10% of samples
det <- 10/100; prev <- 10/100
core <- core_members(ps, detection = det, prevalence = prev, include.lowest = FALSE)
ps_filtered <- prune_taxa(core, ps)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 4. DESeq2 function (returns full results)
# ------------------------------------------------------------
run_deseq2_full <- function(ps_obj, st_name) {
  cat("\n=== Processing stratum:", st_name, "===\n")
  meta <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_obj))
  keep <- meta$Strata == st_name & meta$Timepoint %in% c("-1", "-2")
  ps_st <- prune_samples(keep, ps_obj)
  if (nsamples(ps_st) < 4) { cat("  SKIP\n"); return(NULL) }
  meta_st <- data.frame(sample_data(ps_st))
  patients_both <- meta_st %>%
    group_by(No_Patient) %>%
    summarise(has_both = all(c("-1", "-2") %in% Timepoint)) %>%
    filter(has_both) %>% pull(No_Patient)
  if (length(patients_both) < 2) { cat("  SKIP: <2 paired\n"); return(NULL) }
  ps_st <- prune_samples(meta_st$No_Patient %in% patients_both, ps_st)
  if (nsamples(ps_st) < 4) { cat("  SKIP\n"); return(NULL) }
  ps_st <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_st) > 0, ps_st)
  if (ntaxa(ps_st) == 0) { cat("  SKIP\n"); return(NULL) }
  
  sample_data(ps_st)$Timepoint <- factor(sample_data(ps_st)$Timepoint, levels = c("-1", "-2"))
  counts <- as(otu_table(ps_st), "matrix")
  if (!taxa_are_rows(ps_st)) counts <- t(counts)
  counts[is.na(counts)] <- 0; counts[counts < 0] <- 0; counts <- round(counts)
  coldata <- as.data.frame(sample_data(ps_st))
  
  dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts, colData = coldata, design = ~ No_Patient + Timepoint)
  dds <- DESeq(dds, test = "Wald", fitType = "local", sfType = "poscounts", quiet = TRUE)
  res <- lfcShrink(dds, contrast = c("Timepoint", "-2", "-1"), type = "ashr", quiet = TRUE)
  res_df <- as.data.frame(res)
  res_df$Species <- rownames(res_df)
  
  # Add taxonomy and clean label
  tax_info <- as.data.frame(tax_table(ps_st)[rownames(res_df), ])
  res_df$Genus <- ifelse(!is.na(tax_info$Genus), tax_info$Genus, "")
  res_df$Family <- ifelse(!is.na(tax_info$Family), tax_info$Family, "")
  
  # Extract clean species name from the full taxonomy in rownames
  clean_species <- function(tax_string) {
    parts <- strsplit(tax_string, "\\|")[[1]]
    last <- tail(parts, 1)
    last <- gsub("^s__", "", last)   # remove 's__' prefix
    return(last)
  }
  res_df$CleanLabel <- sapply(rownames(res_df), clean_species)
  
  return(res_df)
}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 5. Run for all strata
# ------------------------------------------------------------
strata_names <- c("AB", "PPI", "OTH", "NO")
volc_results <- list()
for (st in strata_names) {
  volc_results[[st]] <- run_deseq2_full(ps_filtered, st)
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 6. Volcano plot function
# ------------------------------------------------------------
create_volcano <- function(df, stratum_name) {
  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) {
    cat("No data for", stratum_name, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  df$Significant <- !is.na(df$padj) & abs(df$log2FoldChange) >= 1.5 & df$padj < 0.05
  df$neg_log10_padj <- -log10(df$padj)
  df$neg_log10_padj[is.infinite(df$neg_log10_padj)] <- max(df$neg_log10_padj[is.finite(df$neg_log10_padj)], na.rm = TRUE)
  
  p <- ggplot(df, aes(x = log2FoldChange, y = neg_log10_padj, color = Significant, label = CleanLabel)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "red", "FALSE" = "gray50")) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1.5, 1.5), linetype = "dashed", color = "blue", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "blue", alpha = 0.5) +
    geom_text(size = 4, check_overlap = TRUE, vjust = -0.5) +
    theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    labs(title = paste("Volcano plot -", stratum_name),
         x = "log2 Fold Change (-2 vs -1)",
         y = "-log10(adjusted p-value)") +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
  return(p)
}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# 7. Generate and save volcano plots
# ------------------------------------------------------------
out_dir <- "/volcano_plots_strata"
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

for (st in names(volc_results)) {
  p <- create_volcano(volc_results[[st]], st)
  if (!is.null(p)) {
    ggsave(file.path(out_dir, paste0("volcano_", st, ".png")), p, width = 20, height = 11, dpi = 300)
    ggsave(file.path(out_dir, paste0("volcano_", st, ".pdf")), p, width = 20, height = 11)
    cat("Saved volcano plot for", st, "\n")
  }
}

# Also save full results for each stratum
for (st in names(volc_results)) {
  if (!is.null(volc_results[[st]]))
    write.csv(volc_results[[st]], file.path(out_dir, paste0("DESeq2_full_", st, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
}
```
#log10 colored
```{r}
# ============================================================================
# COMBINED PLOTS FOR SIGNIFICANT SPECIES (LogFC + Log10 Abundance + Prevalence)
# ============================================================================

library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(patchwork)
library(ggrepel)

if("package:plyr" %in% search()) detach("package:plyr", unload=TRUE)

# --- Colour definitions (same as Shannon plot) ----------------------------
strata_colors_reg <- c(
  AB  = "#E41A1C",   # red
  PPI = "#377EB8",   # blue
  OTH = "#4DAF4A",   # green
  NO  = "#984EA3"    # purple
)

lighten <- function(col, factor = 0.6) {
  rgb(t(col2rgb(col) + (255 - col2rgb(col)) * factor), maxColorValue = 255)
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Helper: clean species name from rowname (same as in volcano)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
clean_species_name <- function(tax_string) {
  parts <- strsplit(tax_string, "\\|")[[1]]
  last <- tail(parts, 1)
  last <- gsub("^s__", "", last)
  return(last)
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Function to process phyloseq data for a given stratum and species list
# Returns: list with $all_data (including zeros) and $nonzero_data
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
process_ps_for_stratum <- function(ps_obj, stratum_name, species_list) {
  cat("Processing stratum", stratum_name, "for", length(species_list), "species...\n")
  
  meta <- sample_data(ps_obj)
  keep_samples <- meta$Strata == stratum_name & meta$Timepoint %in% c("-1", "-2")
  ps_sub <- prune_samples(keep_samples, ps_obj)
  ps_sub <- prune_taxa(taxa_sums(ps_sub) > 0, ps_sub)
  
  if (nsamples(ps_sub) == 0 || ntaxa(ps_sub) == 0) {
    cat("No samples or taxa for stratum", stratum_name, "\n")
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  melted <- psmelt(ps_sub)
  melted$CleanSpecies <- sapply(melted$OTU, clean_species_name)
  
  matched <- melted %>% filter(CleanSpecies %in% species_list)
  
  if (nrow(matched) == 0) {
    cat("No matching species found in phyloseq. Trying partial matching...\n")
    pattern <- paste0("^", gsub("_", "[_ ]", species_list), "$")
    matched <- melted %>%
      filter(grepl(paste(pattern, collapse="|"), CleanSpecies))
    if (nrow(matched) == 0) {
      cat("Still no matches. Skipping.\n")
      return(NULL)
    }
    matched <- matched %>%
      mutate(CleanSpecies = sapply(CleanSpecies, function(x) {
        idx <- which(sapply(species_list, function(sp) grepl(gsub("_", "[_ ]", sp), x)))
        if(length(idx) > 0) species_list[idx[1]] else x
      }))
  }
  
  matched <- matched %>%
    group_by(Sample) %>%
    mutate(RelativeAbundance = Abundance / sum(Abundance) * 100) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  matched$LogAbundance <- log10(matched$RelativeAbundance + 1e-5)
  
  nonzero <- matched %>% filter(Abundance > 0)
  if (nrow(nonzero) > 0) {
    nonzero$LogAbundance <- log10(nonzero$RelativeAbundance)
  }
  
  matched$Timepoint <- factor(matched$Timepoint, levels = c("-1", "-2"))
  if (nrow(nonzero) > 0) nonzero$Timepoint <- factor(nonzero$Timepoint, levels = c("-1", "-2"))
  
  return(list(all_data = matched, nonzero_data = nonzero))
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Loop over strata
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------------
strata_names <- c("AB", "PPI", "OTH", "NO")
out_dir <- "/volcano_plots_strata"

for (st in strata_names) {
  cat("\n======================================\n")
  cat("Stratum:", st, "\n")
  cat("======================================\n")
  
  res_df <- volc_results[[st]]
  if (is.null(res_df) || nrow(res_df) == 0) {
    cat("No DESeq2 results for", st, "- skipping\n")
    next
  }
  
  sig <- !is.na(res_df$padj) & res_df$padj < 0.05 & abs(res_df$log2FoldChange) >= 1.5
  if (sum(sig) == 0) {
    cat("No significant species for", st, "\n")
    next
  }
  
  sig_species <- res_df$CleanLabel[sig]
  cat("Found", length(sig_species), "significant species\n")
  
  # --- Stratum‑specific colours (UNNAMED!) ---
  reg_col  <- unname(strata_colors_reg[st])          # e.g. "#E41A1C"
  light_col <- unname(lighten(strata_colors_reg[st], 0.6))
  
  plot_data <- res_df[sig, c("CleanLabel", "log2FoldChange")] %>%
    mutate(Group = ifelse(log2FoldChange > 0, "Up in -2", "Down in -2")) %>%
    arrange(log2FoldChange) %>%
    mutate(Species = factor(CleanLabel, levels = CleanLabel))
  
  ps_processed <- process_ps_for_stratum(ps_filtered, st, sig_species)
  
  if (is.null(ps_processed)) {
    cat("Could not retrieve abundance data - only plotting logFC\n")
    p1 <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Species, y = log2FoldChange, fill = Group)) +
      geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("Up in -2" = reg_col, "Down in -2" = light_col)) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
      coord_flip() + theme_minimal() +
      labs(title = paste0(st, " : Log2 Fold Change (-2 vs -1)"),
           x = "", y = "log2 Fold Change", fill = "") +
      theme(axis.text.y = element_text(face = "italic", size = 10))
    ggsave(file.path(out_dir, paste0("LogFC_only_", st, ".png")), p1,
           width = 8, height = max(5, nrow(plot_data)*0.3))
    next
  }
  
  all_dat <- ps_processed$all_data
  nonzero_dat <- ps_processed$nonzero_data
  species_order <- levels(plot_data$Species)
  
  all_dat$CleanSpecies <- factor(all_dat$CleanSpecies, levels = species_order)
  if (!is.null(nonzero_dat) && nrow(nonzero_dat) > 0) {
    nonzero_dat$CleanSpecies <- factor(nonzero_dat$CleanSpecies, levels = species_order)
  }
  
  # 1. Log Fold Change bar plot (now with clean, unnamed colours)
  p1 <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Species, y = log2FoldChange, fill = Group)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("Up in -2" = reg_col, "Down in -2" = light_col)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    coord_flip() + theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_text(face = "italic", size = 10),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "top") +
    labs(title = paste0(st, "\nLog2 Fold Change"),
         x = "", y = "log2 Fold Change", fill = "")
  
  # 2. Log10 Abundance boxplot (light for -1, regular for -2)
  p2 <- NULL
  if (!is.null(nonzero_dat) && nrow(nonzero_dat) > 0) {
    p2 <- ggplot(nonzero_dat, aes(x = CleanSpecies, y = LogAbundance, fill = Timepoint)) +
      geom_boxplot(outlier.size = 0.8, alpha = 0.8) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("-1" = light_col, "-2" = reg_col),
                        labels = c("-1", "-2")) +
      coord_flip() + theme_minimal() +
      theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
            axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
            axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
            plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
            legend.position = "top") +
      labs(title = "Log10 Abundance\n(zeros excluded)",
           x = "", y = "log10(Relative Abundance)", fill = "Timepoint")
  } else {
    p2 <- ggplot() + annotate("text", x=0.5, y=0.5, label="No non-zero abundance data") +
      theme_void() + labs(title = "Log10 Abundance")
  }
  
  # 3. Prevalence bar plot
  prevalence <- all_dat %>%
    group_by(CleanSpecies, Timepoint) %>%
    summarise(Prevalence = mean(Abundance > 0) * 100, .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(Timepoint = factor(Timepoint, levels = c("-1", "-2")))
  
  prevalence_wide <- prevalence %>%
    mutate(Direction = ifelse(Timepoint == "-2", "positive", "negative"),
           PlotValue = ifelse(Direction == "negative", -Prevalence, Prevalence))
  
  p3 <- ggplot(prevalence_wide, aes(x = CleanSpecies, y = PlotValue, fill = Timepoint)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", width = 0.7) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("-1" = light_col, "-2" = reg_col),
                      labels = c("-1", "-2")) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = abs, limits = c(-100, 100)) +
    coord_flip() + theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(),
          axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9),
          axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
          legend.position = "top") +
    labs(title = "Prevalence (%)", x = "", y = "Prevalence", fill = "Timepoint")
  
  combined <- p1 + p2 + p3 + plot_layout(ncol = 3, widths = c(1.4, 1, 1)) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = paste0("Group: ", st, " - Significant species (timepoint -2 vs -1)"),
      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
    )
  
  pdf_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("Combined_Significant_", st, ".pdf"))
  png_file <- file.path(out_dir, paste0("Combined_Significant_", st, ".png"))
  ggsave(pdf_file, combined, width = 14, height = max(6, nrow(plot_data)*0.35), limitsize = FALSE)
  ggsave(png_file, combined, width = 14, height = max(6, nrow(plot_data)*0.35), dpi = 300, limitsize = FALSE)
  cat("Saved combined plot for", st, "\n")
  
  stats <- all_dat %>%
    group_by(CleanSpecies, Timepoint) %>%
    summarise(
      MeanAbundance = mean(RelativeAbundance, na.rm = TRUE),
      MedianAbundance = median(RelativeAbundance, na.rm = TRUE),
      Prevalence = mean(Abundance > 0) * 100,
      NonZeroMean = mean(RelativeAbundance[Abundance > 0], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  write.csv(stats, file.path(out_dir, paste0("Species_Stats_", st, ".csv")), row.names = FALSE)
}

cat("\nAll combined plots and statistics saved in:", out_dir, "\n")
```

cat("\nAll volcano plots saved in:", out_dir, "\n")
